security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.shortDescription: New Jersey Courier animation and visual-feature Studio
bundle.longDescription: NJC Studio is a project-aware desktop development environment for the New Jersey Courier animation language, runtime and visual-feature platform.
